member.name: T:Vector.Api.Attributes.AuthorizeRoleAttribute
member.summary: Authorization attribute that checks if the user has the required role(s)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Constants.AchievementTypes
member.summary: Constants for achievement activity types

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllUsers
member.summary: Get all users (admin only)

member.summary: Get user statistics (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.UpdateUserRole(System.Guid,Vector.Api.Controllers.UpdateRoleDto)
member.summary: Update user role (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.DeleteUser(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete user (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllCoachApplications
member.summary: Get all coach applications (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.GetPendingCoachApplications
member.summary: Get pending coach applications (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AdminController.ReviewCoachApplication(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Coach.ReviewCoachApplicationDto)
member.summary: Review (approve/reject) a coach application (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetMyAnalytics
member.summary: Get current user's learning analytics

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetCategoryProgress(System.String)
member.summary: Get progress for a specific category

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetDifficultyProgress(System.String)
member.summary: Get progress for a specific difficulty level

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AnalyticsController.RebuildAnalytics
member.summary: Rebuild analytics from existing solutions and interviews

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Register a new user
member.param: Registration data

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Verify user email address using verification token
member.param: Email verification token from the verification email
member.returns: Success message if email is verified

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ResendVerification(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.ForgotPasswordDto)
member.summary: Resend email verification link
member.param: Email address to resend verification to
member.response: Verification email sent (or email not found for security)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.LoginDto)
member.summary: Login user and return JWT access token
member.param: Login credentials
member.response: Invalid credentials or email not verified

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.ForgotPasswordDto)
member.summary: Request a password reset link to be sent to the user's email.
member.param: Email address for password reset
member.response: Password reset link sent successfully (or email not found for security reasons)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.ResetPasswordDto)
member.summary: Reset user password using a valid reset token.
member.param: Reset password data (token, email, new password)
member.response: Invalid or expired token, or invalid email

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(Vector.Api.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenDto)
member.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token
member.param: Refresh token data
member.returns: New access token and refresh token

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logout user and invalidate refresh token

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoachController.SubmitApplication(Vector.Api.DTOs.Coach.SubmitCoachApplicationDto)
member.summary: Submit a coach application

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoachController.GetMyApplication
member.summary: Get current user's coach application status

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoachController.UploadImage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Upload images for coach application (portfolio, certificates, etc.)

member.summary: Get code draft for a question and language

member.summary: Save code draft

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeDraftController.DeleteCodeDraft(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Delete code draft

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeExecutionController.ExecuteCode(Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Execute code with optional input

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeExecutionController.RunCode(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Run code against visible (non-hidden) test cases for a question (for "Run" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeExecutionController.RunCodeWithTestCases(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.RunCodeWithTestCasesDto)
member.summary: Run code with line-based testcase input (new UI format)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeExecutionController.ValidateSolution(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Validate code against all test cases for a question, including hidden ones (for "Submit" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CodeExecutionController.GetSupportedLanguages
member.summary: Get list of supported programming languages

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController
member.summary: Controller for coin and achievement management

member.summary: Get current user's coins and rank

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.GetUserCoins(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get specific user's coins (public endpoint)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.GetMyTransactions(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get current user's transaction history

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.GetLeaderboard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get leaderboard (top N users by coins)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.GetMyRank
member.summary: Get current user's rank

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.GetAchievements
member.summary: Get all ways to earn coins (achievement definitions)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.AwardCoins(Vector.Api.DTOs.Coins.AwardCoinsRequest)
member.summary: Award coins to a user (Internal API - Admin only) This endpoint is used internally by other services

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.RefreshLeaderboardRanks
member.summary: Refresh leaderboard ranks (Admin only background job trigger)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.CoinsController.CreateOrUpdateAchievement(Vector.Api.Controllers.CreateAchievementRequest)
member.summary: Create or update an achievement definition (Admin only)

member.summary: Request model for creating/updating achievements

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.HealthController.Get
member.summary: Basic health check endpoint

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.HealthController.GetDetailed
member.summary: Detailed health check with database and Redis status

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController
member.summary: Controller for interview matching functionality Handles matching users for peer interviews

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController.StartMatching(System.Guid)
member.summary: Start matching process for a scheduled session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController.GetMatchingStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get matching status for a scheduled session Returns 204 No Content if no matching request exists (this is a valid state)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController.ConfirmMatch(System.Guid)
member.summary: Confirm a match (user confirms readiness)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController.ExpireMatch(System.Guid)
member.summary: Expire a match if not both confirmed within 15 seconds (re-queue users)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.InterviewMatchingController.ExpireAllRequests(System.Guid)
member.summary: Expire all matching requests for a session (used on page refresh/close) Does not create new requests

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.ScheduleInterview(Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto)
member.summary: Schedule a new interview session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetUpcomingSessions
member.summary: Get upcoming scheduled sessions for the current user

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetPastSessions
member.summary: Get past scheduled sessions for the current user

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetScheduledSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a scheduled session by ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.CancelScheduledSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancel a scheduled session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a live interview session by ID, or a scheduled session if no live session exists

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.SwitchRoles(System.Guid)
member.summary: Switch roles between interviewer and interviewee

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.ChangeQuestion(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ChangeQuestionRequestDto)
member.summary: Change the active question in a session (interviewer only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.EndInterview(System.Guid)
member.summary: End an interview session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.SubmitFeedback(Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto)
member.summary: Submit feedback for a session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetSessionFeedback(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get all feedback for a session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetFeedback(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a specific feedback by ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.GetFeedbackStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get feedback status for a session (check if user and opponent have submitted feedback)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.CreateFriendInterview(Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.CreateFriendInterviewDto)
member.summary: Create a "practice with a friend" interview immediately (no schedule / no queue).

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.PeerInterviewController.JoinFriendInterview(System.Guid)
member.summary: Join a "practice with a friend" live session (by link). When the second user joins, the system creates the matching records so the session shows up in both users' history.

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.GetQuestions(Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.QuestionFilterDto)
member.summary: Get all questions with optional filters

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.GetQuestion(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get question by ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.GetQuestionComments(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Get comments for a question (community answers / discussion)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.AddQuestionComment(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateQuestionCommentDto)
member.summary: Add a comment to a question

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.ToggleCommentUpvote(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggle upvote for a comment

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.CreateQuestion(Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateQuestionDto)
member.summary: Create a new question (admin or coach) Admin-created questions are automatically approved Coach-created questions require admin approval

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.SubmitQuestion(Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateQuestionDto)
member.summary: Submit a new question for review (any authenticated user) Non-admin submissions are created as Pending and will not be visible until approved.

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.UploadQuestionVideo(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Upload a question video (mp4/webm). Returns a public URL.

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.UpdateQuestion(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.UpdateQuestionDto)
member.summary: Update a question (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.DeleteQuestion(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a question (admin only)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.GetTestCases(System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get test cases for a question

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Controllers.QuestionController.AddTestCase(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateTestCaseDto)
member.summary: Add a test case to a question (admin or coach)

member.summary: Get solutions for a question

member.summary: Check if user has solved a specific question (optimized lookup)

member.summary: Get solution statistics for current user

Optional session ID to get whiteboard for a session

member.summary: Save whiteboard data for the current user or specified user

member.summary: Seeds the database with initial data (admin user, etc.)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.Common.ApiErrorResponse
member.summary: Standard API error response format

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ChangeQuestionRequestDto
member.summary: Request DTO for changing active question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ChangeQuestionRequestDto.QuestionId
member.summary: Optional: Specific question ID to set as active. If not provided, a random question will be selected.

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ChangeQuestionResponseDto
member.summary: Response DTO for changing active question

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.CreateFriendInterviewDto
member.summary: DTO for creating a "practice with a friend" interview. This creates a live session immediately (no scheduling / no matching queue).

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.CreateFriendInterviewDto.InterviewType
member.summary: Interview type: data-structures-algorithms, system-design, behavioral, product-management, sql, data-science-ml

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.CreateFriendInterviewDto.InterviewLevel
member.summary: Interview level: beginner, intermediate, advanced

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.CreateFriendInterviewDto.PartnerEmail
member.summary: Optional partner email to send the invite link to.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FriendInterviewCreatedDto.RedirectUrl
member.summary: Relative URL (frontend route) the creator should navigate to.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FriendInterviewCreatedDto.InviteUrl
member.summary: Absolute invite URL that can be shared with a friend.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FriendInterviewCreatedDto.EmailSent
member.summary: True only when email delivery is enabled and the send attempt succeeded.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FriendInterviewCreatedDto.EmailDeliveryMode
member.summary: Email delivery mode: "sendgrid" or "disabled".

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto
member.summary: DTO for submitting interview feedback

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.DidSessionHappen
member.summary: Whether the session actually happened

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.ProblemSolvingRating
member.summary: Problem solving rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.ProblemSolvingDescription
member.summary: Problem solving description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.CodingSkillsRating
member.summary: Coding skills rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.CodingSkillsDescription
member.summary: Coding skills description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.CommunicationRating
member.summary: Communication rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.CommunicationDescription
member.summary: Communication description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.ThingsDidWell
member.summary: Things the reviewee did well

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.AreasForImprovement
member.summary: Areas where the reviewee could improve

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.InterviewerPerformanceRating
member.summary: Overall interviewer performance rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.InterviewerPerformanceDescription
member.summary: Interviewer performance description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.AudioVideoIssues
member.summary: Audio/video issues (yes/no/null)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.CodeEditorIssues
member.summary: Code editor issues (yes/no/null)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.AdditionalFeedback
member.summary: Additional feedback for Exponent

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SubmitFeedbackDto.WantEmailIntroduction
member.summary: Whether user wants email introduction to partner (yes/no/null)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.InterviewFeedbackDto
member.summary: DTO for feedback response

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto
member.summary: DTO for feedback status check

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.HasUserSubmittedFeedback
member.summary: Whether the current user has submitted feedback for their opponent

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.HasOpponentSubmittedFeedback

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.Opponent

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.OpponentId
member.summary: The opponent's ID

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.LiveSessionId
member.summary: The live session ID

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.FeedbackStatusDto.OpponentFeedback

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto
member.summary: DTO for scheduling a new interview session

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto.InterviewType
member.summary: Interview type: data-structures-algorithms, system-design, behavioral, product-management, sql, data-science-ml

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto.PracticeType
member.summary: Practice type: peers, friend, expert

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto.InterviewLevel
member.summary: Interview level: beginner, intermediate, advanced

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.ScheduleInterviewDto.ScheduledStartAt
member.summary: Scheduled start time for the interview

member.name: T:Vector.Api.DTOs.PeerInterview.SwitchRolesResponseDto
member.summary: Response DTO for role switch operation

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateTestCaseDto.Input
member.summary:
Input data as plain string (will be used as stdin in Judge0) Example: "2
7
11
15
9" or "[1, 2, 3]
7"

member.name: P:Vector.Api.DTOs.Question.CreateTestCaseDto.ExpectedOutput
member.summary: Expected output as plain string (will be used as expected_output in Judge0) Example: "[0, 1]" or "true"

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Helpers.ImageHelper
member.summary: Helper class for image validation

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Helpers.ImageHelper.ValidateImage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Validates image file with comprehensive checks

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Helpers.ImageHelper.GetFileSizeString(System.Int64)
member.summary: Gets human-readable file size

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub
member.summary: SignalR hub for real-time collaboration during peer interviews

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SetMatchingModalOpen(System.String)
member.summary: Set user as active in the matching modal for a specific session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SetMatchingModalClosed(System.String)
member.summary: Set user as inactive (matching modal closed)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SendChatMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a chat message to other users in the session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SendRoleSwitched(System.String)
member.summary: Notify other users in the session that roles have been switched

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.BroadcastWhiteboardUpdate(System.String,Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.WhiteboardUpdateData)
member.summary: Broadcast whiteboard update to all other users in the session

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.WhiteboardUpdateData
member.summary: Data class for whiteboard updates

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SendWebRTCOffer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send WebRTC offer to peer in session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SendWebRTCAnswer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send WebRTC answer to peer in session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Hubs.CollaborationHub.SendWebRTCIceCandidate(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Send WebRTC ICE candidate to peer in session

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition
member.summary: Defines an achievement type and how many coins it awards

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.ActivityType
member.summary: Unique identifier for the activity type e.g., 'InterviewCompleted', 'QuestionPublished'

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.DisplayName
member.summary: Display name shown to users e.g., "You completed a mock interview"

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.Description
member.summary: Detailed description of the achievement

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.CoinsAwarded
member.summary: Number of coins awarded for this achievement

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.Icon
member.summary: Icon or emoji representing this achievement e.g., "🪙", "🌟", "🤝"

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this achievement is currently active

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.AchievementDefinition.MaxOccurrences
member.summary: Maximum number of times this achievement can be earned Null = unlimited, 1 = one-time only

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.CoachApplication
member.summary: Represents a coach application submitted by a user

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoachApplication.ImageUrls
member.summary: Comma-separated list of image URLs (portfolio, certificates, etc.)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction
member.summary: Represents a single coin transaction (earning or spending)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction.Amount
member.summary: Amount of coins (positive for earning, negative for spending)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction.ActivityType
member.summary: Type of activity that triggered this transaction e.g., 'InterviewCompleted', 'QuestionPublished'

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the transaction

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction.RelatedEntityId
member.summary: Reference to related entity (question, interview, etc.)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.CoinTransaction.RelatedEntityType
member.summary: Type of related entity (e.g., 'Question', 'Interview')

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback
member.summary: Represents feedback provided by one user about another after an interview Each participant can leave separate feedback for the other participant

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.LiveSessionId
member.summary: Live session this feedback is for

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.ReviewerId
member.summary: User who is providing the feedback (reviewer)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.RevieweeId
member.summary: User who is being reviewed (reviewee)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.ProblemSolvingRating
member.summary: Problem solving rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.ProblemSolvingDescription
member.summary: Problem solving description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.CodingSkillsRating
member.summary: Coding skills rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.CodingSkillsDescription
member.summary: Coding skills description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.CommunicationRating
member.summary: Communication rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.CommunicationDescription
member.summary: Communication description

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.ThingsDidWell
member.summary: Things the reviewee did well

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.AreasForImprovement
member.summary: Areas where the reviewee could improve

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.InterviewerPerformanceRating
member.summary: Overall interviewer performance rating (1-5)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewFeedback.InterviewerPerformanceDescription
member.summary: Interviewer performance description

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest
member.summary: Represents a matching request in the queue for pairing users Status transitions: Pending → Matched → Confirmed

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.UserId
member.summary: User who initiated the matching request

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.ScheduledSessionId
member.summary: Scheduled session that triggered this matching request

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.InterviewType
member.summary: Interview type (hard match requirement)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.PracticeType
member.summary: Practice type (hard match requirement)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.InterviewLevel
member.summary: Interview level (soft match - preferred but not required)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.ScheduledStartAt
member.summary: Scheduled start time for matching

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.Status
member.summary: Status: Pending, Matched, Confirmed, Expired, Cancelled

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.MatchedUserId
member.summary: ID of the matched user (when status is Matched or Confirmed)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.LiveSessionId
member.summary: ID of the live session created when match is confirmed

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.UserConfirmed
member.summary: Whether the requesting user has confirmed readiness

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.MatchedUserConfirmed
member.summary: Whether the matched user has confirmed readiness

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewMatchingRequest.ExpiresAt
member.summary: When the matching request expires (10 minutes after creation)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion
member.summary: Represents an interview question (LeetCode-style problem)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Difficulty
member.summary: Difficulty level: Easy, Medium, Hard

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.QuestionType
member.summary: Question type: Coding, Behavioral, Design, Whiteboard, etc.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Category
member.summary: Category: Arrays, Strings, Trees, Graphs, Dynamic Programming, etc.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.CompanyTags
member.summary: Company tags (JSON array): ["Google", "Amazon", "Facebook"]

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Tags
member.summary: Additional tags (JSON array): ["Hash Table", "Two Pointers"]

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Constraints
member.summary: Constraints as text

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Examples
member.summary: Examples (JSON array of example objects)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.Hints
member.summary: Hints (JSON array of strings)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.VideoUrl
member.summary: Optional video URL (mp4 or embeddable URL) for the interview question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.RoleTags
member.summary: Role tags (JSON array): ["Product Manager", "Engineering Manager"]

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.RelatedQuestionIds
member.summary: Related question IDs (JSON array of GUID strings)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.RelatedCourseIds
member.summary: Related course IDs (JSON array of GUID strings) - reserved for future use

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.TimeComplexityHint
member.summary: Time complexity hint (e.g., "O(n)")

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.SpaceComplexityHint
member.summary: Space complexity hint (e.g., "O(1)")

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.AcceptanceRate
member.summary: Acceptance rate (percentage)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the question is active and visible

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.ApprovalStatus
member.summary: Approval status: Pending, Approved, Rejected Admin-created questions are automatically Approved Coach-created questions start as Pending

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.ApprovedBy
member.summary: User who approved/rejected the question (admin only)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.ApprovedAt
member.summary: Date when the question was approved/rejected

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.RejectionReason
member.summary: Rejection reason (if status is Rejected)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion.CreatedBy
member.summary: User who created the question (admin or coach)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestionComment
member.summary: User comment on an interview question (community answers / discussion)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestionComment.ParentCommentId
member.summary: Parent comment for threaded replies (null for top-level comments)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestionComment.CommentType
member.summary: Type of comment: feedback, tip, or question

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestionCommentVote
member.summary: Vote on an interview question comment (one per user per comment)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestionCommentVote.VoteType
member.summary: Vote type: 1 for upvote, -1 for downvote

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics
member.summary: Represents learning analytics and progress tracking for a user

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.QuestionsSolved
member.summary: Total number of questions solved (with accepted solutions)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.QuestionsByCategory
member.summary: Questions solved by category (JSON object): {"Arrays": 5, "Strings": 3, ...}

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.QuestionsByDifficulty
member.summary: Questions solved by difficulty (JSON object): {"Easy": 10, "Medium": 5, "Hard": 2}

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.AverageExecutionTime
member.summary: Average execution time across all accepted solutions (in seconds)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.AverageMemoryUsed
member.summary: Average memory used across all accepted solutions (in bytes)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.SuccessRate
member.summary: Success rate (percentage of accepted solutions)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.CurrentStreak
member.summary: Current streak (consecutive days with at least one accepted solution)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.LongestStreak
member.summary: Longest streak achieved

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.LastActivityDate
member.summary: Date of last activity (last accepted solution)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.TotalSubmissions
member.summary: Total number of submissions (including failed attempts)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LearningAnalytics.SolutionsByLanguage
member.summary: Solutions by language (JSON object): {"python": 10, "javascript": 5, ...}

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant
member.summary: Represents a participant in a live interview session Stores per-user metadata including their role

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.LiveSessionId
member.summary: Live session this participant belongs to

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.UserId
member.summary: User who is participating

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.Role
member.summary: Current role: Interviewer or Interviewee

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this participant is currently in the session

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.JoinedAt
member.summary: When the participant joined the session

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewParticipant.LeftAt
member.summary: When the participant left the session (if they left early)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession
member.summary: Represents an active live interview session with two participants

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.ScheduledSessionId
member.summary: Reference to scheduled session (optional, may be null if created directly)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.FirstQuestionId
member.summary: First question assigned to the session

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.SecondQuestionId
member.summary: Second question assigned to the session (optional, for when they switch roles)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.ActiveQuestionId
member.summary: Currently active question ID (either FirstQuestionId or SecondQuestionId)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.Status
member.summary: Status: InProgress, Completed, Cancelled

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.StartedAt
member.summary: When the session actually started

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.EndedAt
member.summary: When the session ended

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.InterviewerRoomId
member.summary: Excalidraw room ID for the interviewer's whiteboard (for system design interviews) Format: roomId,key (e.g., "35a7b3f8f24f22d21f18,gaiLKrrJVtanONO5UiU2UA")

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession.IntervieweeRoomId
member.summary: Excalidraw room ID for the interviewee's whiteboard (for system design interviews) Format: roomId,key (e.g., "35a7b3f8f24f22d21f18,gaiLKrrJVtanONO5UiU2UA")

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution
member.summary: Represents a solution for an interview question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.Language
member.summary: Programming language: Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, etc.

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.Code
member.summary: Solution code

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.Explanation
member.summary: Solution explanation

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.TimeComplexity
member.summary: Time complexity (e.g., "O(n)")

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.SpaceComplexity
member.summary: Space complexity (e.g., "O(1)")

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.IsOfficial
member.summary: Whether this is an official solution (vs user-submitted)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionSolution.CreatedBy
member.summary: User who created this solution (null if official)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase
member.summary: Represents a test case for an interview question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase.TestCaseNumber
member.summary: Test case number (for ordering)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase.Input
member.summary: Input data (JSON string)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase.ExpectedOutput
member.summary: Expected output (JSON string)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase.IsHidden
member.summary: Whether this is a hidden test case (not shown to user before submission)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionTestCase.Explanation
member.summary: Explanation for this test case (optional)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionVote
member.summary: Represents a user's vote (upvote/downvote) on a question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionVote.QuestionId
member.summary: The question that was voted on

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionVote.UserId
member.summary: User who voted

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.QuestionVote.VoteType
member.summary: Vote type: 1 for upvote, -1 for downvote

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.Referral
member.summary: Represents a user referral

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.ReferrerId
member.summary: User who sent the referral

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.ReferredUserId
member.summary: User who was referred (optional - may not have signed up yet)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.ReferredEmail
member.summary: Email of the referred person

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.ReferralCode
member.summary: Unique referral code/token

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.Status
member.summary: Status: Pending, Completed, Expired

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.CompletedAt
member.summary: When the referred user completed their first interview (triggers reward)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.Referral.ExpiresAt
member.summary: When the referral code expires

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession
member.summary: Represents a scheduled interview session created by a user

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.UserId
member.summary: User who scheduled the interview (session creator)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.InterviewType
member.summary: Interview type: data-structures-algorithms, system-design, behavioral, product-management, sql, data-science-ml

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.PracticeType
member.summary: Practice type: peers, friend, expert

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.InterviewLevel
member.summary: Interview level: beginner, intermediate, advanced

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.ScheduledStartAt
member.summary: Scheduled start time for the interview

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.Status
member.summary: Status: Scheduled, Cancelled, Completed, InProgress

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.LiveSession
member.summary: Reference to live session if one was created from this scheduled session (navigation property only - foreign key is on LiveInterviewSession)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.ScheduledInterviewSession.AssignedQuestionId
member.summary: Question assigned to this user when scheduling (only for data-structures-algorithms interview type)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.UserCodeDraft
member.summary: Represents a user's code draft (work in progress) for a question and language

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserCodeDraft.Language
member.summary: Programming language used (python, javascript, java, cpp, csharp, go)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserCodeDraft.Code
member.summary: Draft code (work in progress)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.UserCoins
member.summary: Represents a user's total coins and cached rank

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserCoins.Rank
member.summary: Cached rank for performance (updated periodically by background job)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserCoins.LastRankUpdate
member.summary: Timestamp of last rank update

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution
member.summary: Represents a user's solution submission for an interview question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.Language
member.summary: Programming language used (python, javascript, java, cpp, csharp, go)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.Code
member.summary: Submitted code

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.Status
member.summary: Overall status: Accepted, Wrong Answer, Time Limit Exceeded, Runtime Error, Compilation Error

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.ExecutionTime
member.summary: Execution time in seconds

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.MemoryUsed
member.summary: Memory used in bytes

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.TestCasesPassed
member.summary: Number of test cases passed

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolution.TotalTestCases
member.summary: Total number of test cases

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.UserSolvedQuestion
member.summary: Tracks which questions a user has solved (optimized lookup table)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData
member.summary: Represents whiteboard data for a user

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.UserId
member.summary: Foreign key to User (nullable for session-based whiteboards)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.User
member.summary: Navigation property to User

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.QuestionId
member.summary: Optional question ID if whiteboard is associated with a question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.Question
member.summary: Navigation property to Question

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.SessionId
member.summary: Optional session ID for collaborative whiteboards (for peer interviews)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.Elements
member.summary: Excalidraw elements (JSON array)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.AppState
member.summary: Excalidraw app state (JSON object)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.Files
member.summary: Excalidraw files (JSON object)

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when whiteboard was created

member.name: P:Vector.Api.Models.WhiteboardData.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when whiteboard was last updated

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CoachService
member.summary: Service for managing coach applications

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService
member.summary: Service for executing code using Judge0 API

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.ExecuteCodeAsync(Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Execute code with optional input

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.RunCodeAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Run code against visible (non-hidden) test cases for a question (for "Run" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.ValidateSolutionAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Validate code against all test cases for a question, including hidden ones (for "Submit" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.RunCodeWithTestCasesAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.RunCodeWithTestCasesDto)
member.summary: Run code with line-based testcase input (new UI format)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.RunSqlCodeWithTestCasesAsync(Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.RunCodeWithTestCasesDto)
member.summary: Run SQL code with test cases - handles SQL test case format (JSON with schema/data)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.GetSupportedLanguagesAsync
member.summary: Get list of supported programming languages Uses Judge0 Official API language IDs

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.MapToExecutionResult(Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.Judge0ExecutionResult)
member.summary: Map Judge0 execution result to ExecutionResultDto

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.NormalizeSqlOutput(System.String)
member.summary: Normalize SQL output for comparison (handles various formats from Judge0 SQLite)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.Judge0SubmissionResponse
member.summary: Judge0 submission response model

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.Judge0ExecutionResult
member.summary: Judge0 execution result model Note: Judge0 Official API uses lowercase property names in JSON

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CodeExecutionService.Judge0Status
member.summary: Judge0 status model

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CodeWrapperService
member.summary: Service to wrap user code with test case execution logic

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeWrapperService.WrapCodeForExecution(System.String,System.String,System.String,Vector.Api.Models.InterviewQuestion)
member.summary: Wraps user code to execute with test case inputs

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CodeWrapperService.ExtractParameterNames(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extract parameter names from function signature

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.CoinService
member.summary: Service for managing coins and achievements

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.CoinService.AwardCoinsAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Robust and consistent method to award coins for any activity. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all coin grants.

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IAnalyticsService.UpdateAnalyticsAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Update analytics when a solution is submitted

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IAnalyticsService.GetUserAnalyticsAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get user analytics

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IAnalyticsService.GetCategoryProgressAsync(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Get progress for a specific category

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IAnalyticsService.GetDifficultyProgressAsync(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Get progress for a specific difficulty level

member.summary: Calculate and update streak for a user

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IAnalyticsService.RebuildAnalyticsAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Rebuild analytics from existing data for a user

member.summary: Service interface for coach application management

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoachService.GetApplicationByUserIdAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get coach application by user ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoachService.GetApplicationByIdAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get coach application by ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoachService.GetPendingApplicationsAsync
member.summary: Get all pending coach applications (for admin)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoachService.GetAllApplicationsAsync
member.summary: Get all coach applications (for admin)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoachService.ReviewApplicationAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Coach.ReviewCoachApplicationDto)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService
member.summary: Service interface for code execution using Judge0 API

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService.ExecuteCodeAsync(Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Execute code with optional input

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService.RunCodeAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Run code against visible (non-hidden) test cases for a question (for "Run" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService.RunCodeWithTestCasesAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.RunCodeWithTestCasesDto)
member.summary: Run code with line-based testcase input (new UI format)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService.ValidateSolutionAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.CodeExecution.ExecutionRequestDto)
member.summary: Validate code against all test cases for a question, including hidden ones (for "Submit" button)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICodeExecutionService.GetSupportedLanguagesAsync
member.summary: Get list of supported programming languages

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.ICoinService
member.summary: Service interface for coin and achievement management

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ICoinService.AwardCoinsAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Award coins to a user for completing an activity. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all coin grants.

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService
member.summary: Service interface for interview matching functionality Handles matching users for peer interviews

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.StartMatchingAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Start matching process for a scheduled session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.GetMatchingStatusAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Get matching status for a scheduled session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.ConfirmMatchAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Confirm a match (user confirms readiness)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.ExpireMatchIfNotConfirmedAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Expire a match if not both confirmed within 15 seconds

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.ExpireAllRequestsForSessionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Expire all active matching requests for a user and session (used on page refresh/close) Does not create new requests

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IInterviewMatchingService.ExpireMatchOnUserDisconnectAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Immediately expire a match when a user disconnects during confirmation. Re-queues the remaining active user if they're still on the matching modal.

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.IMatchingPresenceService
member.summary: Service for tracking user presence in the matching modal

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IMatchingPresenceService.SetUserActive(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Set user as active in the matching modal for a specific session

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IMatchingPresenceService.SetUserInactive(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Set user as inactive (modal closed)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IMatchingPresenceService.IsUserActive(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Check if user is currently active in the matching modal

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IMatchingPresenceService.ClearUserPresence(System.Guid)
member.summary: Clear all presence for a user (e.g., on disconnect)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.InterviewMatchingService
member.summary: Service for interview matching functionality Handles matching users for peer interviews

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.InterviewMatchingService.GenerateExcalidrawRoomId
member.summary: Generates an Excalidraw room ID in the format: roomId,key Similar to Excalidraw's format: "35a7b3f8f24f22d21f18,gaiLKrrJVtanONO5UiU2UA"

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.IPeerInterviewService
member.summary: Service interface for peer interview functionality

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.IRedisService
member.summary: Redis service for caching, session management, and rate limiting

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.IS3Service
member.summary: Service for handling S3 file operations

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IS3Service.UploadFileAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads a file to S3 and returns the public URL
member.param: The file stream to upload
The name of the file
The MIME type of the file
Optional folder path within the bucket (e.g., "profile-pictures")
member.returns: The public URL of the uploaded file

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IS3Service.DeleteFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a file from S3
member.param: The URL of the file to delete

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.IS3Service.GetPresignedUrlAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a presigned URL for temporary file access
member.param: The S3 key of the file
URL expiration time in minutes

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.SubmitSolutionAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Solution.SubmitSolutionDto)
member.summary: Submit a solution for a question (only called when validation passes)

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.GetUserSolutionsAsync(System.Guid,Vector.Api.DTOs.Solution.SolutionFilterDto)
member.summary: Get user's solutions

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.GetSolutionByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Get solution by ID

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.GetSolutionsForQuestionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Get solutions for a specific question

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.GetSolutionStatisticsAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get solution statistics for a user

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.ISolutionService.HasUserSolvedQuestionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Check if a user has solved a specific question (optimized lookup)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.SolutionStatisticsDto
member.summary: Solution statistics DTO

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.MatchingPresenceService
member.summary: In-memory service for tracking user presence in the matching modal Uses ConcurrentDictionary for thread-safe operations

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.PeerInterviewService.UpdateScheduledSessionsOnEndAsync(Vector.Api.Models.LiveInterviewSession)
member.summary: Helper function to update all scheduled sessions when an interview ends. Ensures both users' scheduled sessions are marked as completed and have access to both questions and partner information.

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.PeerInterviewService.GenerateExcalidrawRoomId
member.summary: Generates an Excalidraw room ID in the format: roomId,key Similar to Excalidraw's format: "35a7b3f8f24f22d21f18,gaiLKrrJVtanONO5UiU2UA"

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.PeerInterviewService.AwardCoinsForQuestionUsageAsync(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Guid)
member.summary: Awards coins to a question creator when their question is used in an interview

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.RedisService
member.summary: Redis service implementation for caching, tokens, and rate limiting Uses connection pooling via IConnectionMultiplexer (singleton)

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.S3Service
member.summary: Service for handling S3 file operations

member.name: T:Vector.Api.Services.TestCaseParserService
member.summary: Service to parse and validate line-based testcase input

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.TestCaseParserService.ParseTestCases(System.String,System.Int32,System.String[])
member.summary: Parse line-based testcase input into structured testcases

member.name: M:Vector.Api.Services.UserService.CheckAndAwardProfileCompletionCoinsAsync(Vector.Api.Models.User)
member.summary: Checks if user's profile is complete and awards coins (one-time only) Profile is complete if: FirstName, LastName, Email, ProfilePictureUrl, Bio, PhoneNumber, Location are all filled
